item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -eu
python3 -c 'import json; d=json.load(open(\"longhorizon-work/rehearsal-B/config/policy.json\", encoding=\"utf-8\")); assert type(d[\"retry_limit\"]) is int and d[\"retry_limit\"] == 5; print(\"retry_limit=5 type=int PASS\")'
doc_hash="'$(shasum -a 256 longhorizon-work/rehearsal-B/docs/policy.md | awk '"'{print "'$1}'"')
[ \""'$doc_hash" = '"'ebf46f424048c732f5734c535c8e8aab0651ea6eefcc7f5346086f1674cc20d9' ]
printf 'docs_unchanged_sha256=%s PASS\\n' \""'$doc_hash"
sed -n '"'1,20p' longhorizon-work/rehearsal-B/config/policy.json"

/bin/zsh -lc "set -eu
python3 -c 'import json; d=json.load(open(\"longhorizon-work/rehearsal-B/config/policy.json\", encoding=\"utf-8\")); assert type(d[\"retry_limit\"]) is int and d[\"retry_limit\"] == 5; print(\"retry_limit=5 type=int PASS\")'
doc_hash="'$(shasum -a 256 longhorizon-work/rehearsal-B/docs/policy.md | awk '"'{print "'$1}'"')
[ \""'$doc_hash" = '"'ebf46f424048c732f5734c535c8e8aab0651ea6eefcc7f5346086f1674cc20d9' ]
printf 'docs_unchanged_sha256=%s PASS\\n' \""'$doc_hash"
sed -n '"'1,20p' longhorizon-work/rehearsal-B/config/policy.json"
